name: Flake Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Oat flakes; bran flakes; or Grape nut flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together all ingredients except the flake of your choice.
2. Add the chosen flakes and mix until well combined.
3. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls using floured hands.
4. Place the balls on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 10-15 minutes.
6. Cool and store in a tightly covered container.
